Brass Cart Supply
Shop About

Why this fixture exists

A tiny static store with real product expectations.

This page gives the importer non-product content to convert while the shop pages exercise product references, product categories, prices, and cart-ready URLs.

Fixture assertions

  • Products are created by Static Site Importer from `products.json`.
  • Converted pages remain valid editable blocks.
  • Ordinary product cards convert through native blocks.
